title: Castro
compiled_truth: Castro is an external contact at [Rice](companies/rice). Over the corpus period (2000-11-10 to 2002-01-29), Castro sent 24 and received 37 emails, totalling 61 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince J Kaminski](people/vince-j-kaminski) (19), [Vkaminski](people/vkaminski-aol) (4), [Vkamins](people/vkamins) (3), [Kenneth Parkhill](people/kenneth-parkhill) (1), [Swa](people/swa-rice) (1).
